name: Pipedrive API v1
description: Pipedrive API v1 provides a REST API for programmatic access to its features. Use it to automate workflows and integrate with other services.

capabilities.name: activity_fields
capabilities.description: Manage activity fields — get all activity fields. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: activity_types
capabilities.description: Manage activity types — add new activity type, update an activity type, get all activity types. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: billing
capabilities.description: Manage billing — get all add-ons for a single company. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: call_logs
capabilities.description: Manage call logs — add a call log, attach an audio file to the call log, get all call logs assigned to a particular user. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: currencies
capabilities.description: Manage currencies — get all supported currencies. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: deals
capabilities.description: Manage deals — duplicate deal, add a follower to a deal, add a participant to a deal. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: deal_fields
capabilities.description: Manage deal fields — add a new deal field, update a deal field, get all deal fields. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: files
capabilities.description: Manage files — add file, create a remote file and link it to an item, link a remote file to an item. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: filters
capabilities.description: Manage filters — add a new filter, update filter, get all filters. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: goals
capabilities.description: Manage goals — add a new goal, update existing goal, find goals. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: leads
capabilities.description: Manage leads — add a lead, get all leads, get all archived leads. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: lead_fields
capabilities.description: Manage lead fields — get all lead fields. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.
